mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, project_id, tag, type, content, vector_ids, created_at, updated_at FROM knowledge_bases WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id, name, project_id, tag, type, content, vector_ids, created_at, updated_at FROM knowledge_bases WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id, name, project_id, tag, type, content, vector_ids, created_at, updated_at FROM knowledge_bases WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND type = #{type} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM knowledge_bases WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND name = #{name} AND id != #{excludeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_bases WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, user_id, name, project_id, tag, type, content, vector_ids, created_at, updated_at FROM knowledge_bases WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
